title: [BUG] Load Image Media not be read rotation property
author: nguyen-mt
body:
## 🐛 Load Image Media not be read rotation property

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

Lib version: 4.0.1

When I read excel xlxs file and then write new file from readed data. Rotation property of image not be read, so when write file with corrupted images

<!-- The exact steps required to reproduce the issue, ideally with a code example -->

```javascript
// Read File
var workbook = new EXCELJS.Workbook()
workbook.xlsx.readFile(filePath)

/* Main process: adding other medias, mainpulate cell */

// Write File
workbook.xlsx.writeFile('newfilename.xlsx', { useSharedString: true, useStyles: true })

```

Please update rotation when read and write media.

comments.author: nguyen-mt
comments.body: ### Origin file before read ### Writed file Please update rotation when read and write media.

comments.author: zurmokeeper
comments.body: @zjhiphop If you don't mind, keep an eye on the [program](https://github.com/zurmokeeper/excelize), or drop me an issue here so I can see what's wrong when I have time.
